overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a player character wading through a shallow river in a wilderness area. The character moves along the riverbed past grassy banks and scattered trees, encountering a small herd of deer crossing the water. The scene features detailed natural environments with rocky formations in the background under a partly cloudy sky.

events.description: character steps from grassy bank into the shallow river water
moving from dry land to wading in the river

agents.ego_description: walking from grassy riverbank into the shallow water, heading toward the center of the stream

entered.detail: clear shallow river with visible rocky bottom
rocky and pebble-strewn riverbed visible through clear water
large rocky outcrops and cliffs on the far side of the valley
scattered deciduous trees along the river edge

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a grassy riverbank with a view across the water to distant rock formations. The camera moves forward, transitioning from dry grass into the shallow river. The water is clear, revealing a rocky gravel bed beneath, while trees line the right bank and rocky cliffs rise in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow river crossing with gravel bars

events.description: group of deer enter the river from the left bank and cross to the right

agents.ego_description: wading through the shallow river, observing wildlife and foraging for plants

notable_agents.action: deer walking through the shallow water, crossing from left bank to right bank

entered.detail: boulders and large rocks protruding from the river surface

segments.scene_description: The camera continues wading through the shallow river, moving past large rocks in the water. A group of deer enters the frame from the left, crossing the river toward the right bank. The riverbed consists of gravel and stones, with trees growing closer on the right shoreline.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined river section with overhead canopy

events.description: moving under tree canopy causes shift from direct sunlight to dappled shade
slight turn to follow the river bend to the right

agents.ego_description: continuing along the riverbed through shallow water, moving under tree cover and following the river's curve

entered.detail: tree branches and leaves forming partial canopy over the river

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues along the river as the camera moves under the shade of overhanging trees. The lighting shifts to dappled sunlight filtering through leaves. The river curves gently to the right, with grassy banks visible on both sides and the distant rock formations fading from view behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from an open, sunlit riverbank into the shaded depths of a wooded waterway. It begins on a grassy bank overlooking distant rock formations before the camera moves forward, transitioning from dry grass into the clear, shallow water of a rocky riverbed. As the camera wades further downstream past large stones, a group of deer enters the frame from the left to cross toward the right bank. The scene then shifts as the camera moves under the canopy of overhanging trees, where the bright light transforms into dappled sunlight filtering through the leaves. Finally, the river curves gently to the right, leaving the distant cliffs behind as the camera follows the water deeper into the lush, grassy wilderness.
